title: The Trial
description:
You join a line of people entering a massive building.

As you pass under a [gold]golden archway[/gold], horns blare, [jitter]confetti explodes[/jitter], and [sine]streamers glide[/sine] down from the ceiling!

"Entrant [blue][a random number between 101 and 999][/blue], you are the [green]DECIDER[/green] for today's [gold]Trial[/gold]."
notes:
This is a complex multi-stage branching event with randomized scenarios.

[gold]Initial Choice:[/gold] If you Accept, you sit in the [gold]Chair of Decision-Making[/gold]. If you Reject, the [gold]Grand Arbiter of the Courts[/gold] threatens you with [red]DEATH[/red] and forces you to choose again between serving as Decider or facing lethal repercussions (9999 damage).

[gold]Trial Scenarios:[/gold] One of three scenarios is randomly selected (equal 1/3 probability each):

1. [gold]Merchant Trial[/gold] — A wealthy merchant accused of murder. Verdict options:
   - [green]Guilty[/green]: Add [red]Regret[/red] curse to deck, obtain 2 random Relics
   - [green]Innocent[/green]: Add [red]Shame[/red] curse to deck, upgrade 2 cards

2. [gold]Noble Trial[/gold] — A powerful noble with corruption charges. A bribe offer is mentioned. Verdict options:
   - [green]Guilty[/green]: Heal 10 HP
   - [green]Innocent[/green]: Add [red]Regret[/red] curse to deck, gain 300 Gold

3. [gold]Nondescript Trial[/gold] — A woman accused of theft and con-artistry. Witnesses and her testimony conflict. Verdict options:
   - [green]Guilty[/green]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] curse to deck, gain 2 card rewards
   - [green]Innocent[/green]: Add [red]Doubt[/red] curse to deck, transform 2 cards

[gold]Rewards Summary:[/gold] Each verdict leads to a different combination of curses, relics, gold, healing, and card effects. The event ends after rendering your verdict.
